tracks.title: This Time
tracks.lyrics:
I'm running out of time, gotta stand up now
And go before I miss my last chance
Jumped off that one-way train of thought
Caught on the many years that went to waste

Long gone are simple motives that made much sense
To stay on track when nobody cared
Cause I don't wanna die all alone without
Allowing my true self to speak in

There's a lot of things I wish I could say
Had to put these words together someway
It's the best I can do for now

This time I promised that I wouldn't give up
Inspiration lighting this fire
Fed up by alter-egos braking me down
They don't know I'm ready to fight back
This time I'm giving away these melodies blind
'Cause there's no such thing as "the right one"
No way I'm ever going back after coming this far
 
I felt like being followed around and around
And barely saved me from myself
That day I stopped caring about their demand
Determined to embrace what I am

There's a lot of things I wish I could say
Had to put these words together someway
It's the best I can do for now

This time I promised that I wouldn't give up
Inspiration lighting this fire
Fed up by  alter-egos braking me down
This time I'm giving away these melodies blind
'Cause there's no such thing as "the right one"
No way I'm ever going back after coming this far
No I'm never crossing that line
Uh-uh, uh-uh, uh-uh, uh-uh
